glue.crawler.s3target.ConnectionName.Description: The name of a connection which allows a job or crawler to access data in Amazon S3 within an Amazon Virtual Private Cloud environment (Amazon VPC).

glue.crawler.s3target.DlqEventQueueArn.Description: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

glue.crawler.s3target.EventQueueArn.Description: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

glue.crawler.s3target.Exclusions.Description: A list of glob patterns used to exclude from the crawl. For more information, see [Catalog Tables with a Crawler](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/add-crawler.html).

glue.crawler.s3target.Path.Description: The path to the Amazon S3 target.

glue.crawler.s3target.SampleSize.Description: Sets the number of files in each leaf folder to be crawled when crawling sample files in a dataset. If not set, all the files are crawled. A valid value is an integer between 1 and 249.
